memory_entries.text: In jazzband/tablib, Dataset._package in src/tablib/core.py packages exports; it previously used list(self._data), a shallow copy of Row objects. Formatter assignments in _package mutate Row.__setitem__, corrupting underlying dataset across repeated exports. Fix by using [row.list for row in self._data] before applying formatters. Also add_formatter(None, handler) must be explicitly allowed in Python 3.11 because None > width raises TypeError; documented all-column formatting relies on None.
